Quick Tips

Enter your email extension correctly during login (

@stu.khas.edu.tr

/

@khas.edu.tr

).

In case of connection issues, try toggling Wi-Fi off/on; try again from a different spot.

If VPN is on, it may cause issues during the first connection; try turning it off temporarily.

Leave 'connect automatically' on only for your frequently used devices.

Frequently Asked Questions

Connection failed / authentication error

Type your username in

email format

(e.g.,

[email protected]

). Reset your password if it is not current.

Signal may be affected during peak hours. Try toggling Wi-Fi off/on; use a 5 GHz supported adapter if possible.

How is guest access?

The

Guest

network may be opened according to periodic policies. A request must be created by the relevant unit for events/visits.
